title: salix purpurea var. helix
intro: Salix purpurea var. helix, also known as curly willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family and is native to Eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Salix purpurea var. helix include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Salix purpurea var. helix can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
